indications.text:
PRINZIDE is indicated for the treatment of hypertension.
These fixed-dose combinations are not indicated for initial therapy (see DOSAGE AND
ADMINISTRATION).
In using PRINZIDE, consideration should be given to the fact that an angiotensin converting enzyme
inhibitor, captopril, has caused agranulocy...
